title: plenasium hongkongense
intro: Plenasium hongkongense, also known as the Hong Kong polypore, is a type of edible fungus that belongs to the family Polyporaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Plenasium hongkongense include its ability to boost the immune system, lower cholesterol levels, and aid in digestion. In herbal preparations, it is often used in decoctions or infusions, and can also be consumed as a raw ingredient in soups or stir-fries.
